items: The Updates pane can now expand to show the notes from earlier releases, so you can browse your update history in one place.
Creating a new agent no longer scrambles the on-screen output of your other running agents.
Opening the new-session dialog no longer freezes the app for a couple of seconds.
On macOS, microphone and folder permissions now work correctly in the downloaded app: you're asked once after updating, and the grant sticks from then on instead of being requested again and again.
Folders you've deleted from disk are now cleared from the sidebar automatically when the app starts.
